active.text: STYLE LOCK: Period gothic live-action, mid-19th-century interiors; candlelight and deep shadows; desaturated cool-gray palette; naturalistic skin and fabric texture; no illustration or stylized animation.

PERFORMANCE LOCK: First-person confessional adaptation. The Narrator frequently addresses an implied listener/camera when in the bare room, calm-to-fevered direct address; flashback scenes are objective third-person staging where characters look at each other and scene action, not the viewer. Officers remain polite, observational, and scene-partner focused.
